title: Where did Yui merge
wikitext:
[]: Where did Yui merge?             Quote Post by Analyzor » Fri Aug 21, 2020 2:05 pm Hi there. I'm having a debate with some folks and I have no clue about what they actually did in the Artificial Evolution Laboratory. I always thought that the Contact Experiment happend there but after realising that the EVAs cementery (and therefore their creation) is in Dogma Terminal... I have my doubts now. Could it be that it has taken place in Dogma Terminal instead of the Laboratory? That would tell us that Shinji has been in NERV way before. When can we tell it has been? during the creation of EVA01 when Lilith was still attached or later? Here we can see how EVA01 has it's core during his creation.

[]: Re: Where did Yui merge?             Quote Post by AWinters » Fri Aug 21, 2020 2:23 pm I got the impression that she was in Unit 01, which is how she got absorbed into it (just like Shinji did, but he got rescued). I'm confused that Ritsuko was part of the failed rescue mission of Yui, which resulted in the creation of Rei, yet Ritsuko's mother didn't know where Rei came from

[]: Re: Where did Yui merge?             Quote Post by Analyzor » Fri Aug 21, 2020 2:51 pm AWinters wrote: I got the impression that she was in Unit 01, which is how she got absorbed into it (just like Shinji did, but he got rescued). I'm confused that Ritsuko was part of the failed rescue mission of Yui, which resulted in the creation of Rei, yet Ritsuko's mother didn't know where Rei came from

[]: Re: Where did Yui merge?             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Aug 21, 2020 3:03 pm The title card for the scene that includes the ani-gif sets the time and place as 2004 AD. Hakone, Second Underground Experimental Installation

[]: Re: Where did Yui merge?             Quote Post by Analyzor » Fri Aug 21, 2020 3:13 pm Mr. Tines wrote: The title card for the scene that includes the ani-gif sets the time and place as which doesn't narrow things down beyond "somewhere in the GeoFront" The earlier scene at the Artificial Evolution Laboratory (dateline 2003) flows immediately from the "I have one thing to show you." into Gendo's "Someone left this cavity behind" ... "That is the installation which is consuming all that humanity has." It is only implied, but it would seem likely that the thing to show -- the GeoFront -- was actually what was lurking in the AEL sub-sub-basement, rather than there being an extended cross-country journey between the two locations. Being one atop the other also makes it easier to dump the AEL trash straight down into the Eva Graveyard. The rebuilds may or may not have completely revised the details, that being a distinct timeline.

[]: Re: Where did Yui merge?             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Aug 21, 2020 3:16 pm AWinters wrote: I'm confused that Ritsuko was part of the failed rescue mission of Yui, which resulted in the creation of Rei, yet Ritsuko's mother didn't know where Rei came from

[]: Re: Where did Yui merge?             Quote Post by AWinters » Fri Aug 21, 2020 3:34 pm Mr. Tines wrote: In episode 23', the scene was added where Fuyutsuki describes Rei as the product of his despair, suggesting that he probably took the lead in the experiments, with Gendo being the only other person in the loop when Rei was extracted from the Yui-soup.

[]: Re: Where did Yui merge?             Quote Post by orcot » Fri Aug 21, 2020 4:30 pm Makes you wonder why their isn't any real interaction between Rei and Fuyutsuki (that we see off). Considering Gendo choose to place Shinji with his teacher, Fuyutsuki would have been the obvious candidate to take care of Rei. To be honnest now that I think abouth it Rei resembles Fuyutsuki in character more then she resembles Yui (both Rei and Fuyutsuki would be considered ISTJ whilst Yui is INFJ https://personality-database.com/subcat ... ality-type ) Yes Rei shows intrest in Yui field but Fuyutsuki was her professor. Rei might mimic Gendo's gestures,but she acts far more like Fuyutsuki. I would have loved to see a interaction between those 2. In the Manga Fuyutsuki and Yui are pretty close in the fact they went on hiking trips together and you had the impression that she told him of Gendo before she was a official couple, manga fuyutsuki also knew the most of what was happening during Yui's absorption as Yui was to be killed by Seele and she have instructions on what to do afther she was gone. She might even have given the instruction to make Rei. It might be mixing sources manga and anime but anime Fuyutsuki indeed calls Rei "the product of his despair" manga fuyutsuki says he deeply regretted agreeing to do Yui's wishes afther she died as it caused a lot of harm to many people. He might or might not have been aware that the person he was talking to was not Yui but Rei as he tells "Yui" if she had already found Yui-kun
summary: []: Where did Yui merge?             Quote Post by Analyzor » Fri Aug 21, 2020 2:05 pm Hi there. I'm having a debate with some folks and I have no clue about what they actually did in the Artificial Evolution Laboratory. I always thought that the Contact Experiment happend there but after realising that the EVAs cementery (and therefore their creation) is in Dogma Terminal... I have my doubts now. Could it be that it has taken place in Dogm

Article: Where did Yui merge
. To be honnest now that I think abouth it Rei resembles Fuyutsuki in character more then she resembles Yui (both Rei and Fuyutsuki would be considered ISTJ whilst Yui is INFJ https://personality-database.com/subcat ... ality-type ) Yes Rei shows intrest in Yui field but Fuyutsuki was her professor. Rei might mimic Gendo's gestures,but she acts far more like Fuyutsuki. I would have loved to see a interaction between those 2. In the Manga Fuyutsuki and Yui are pretty close in the fact they went on hiking trips together and you had the impression that she told him of Gendo before she was a official couple, manga fuyutsuki also knew the most of what was happening during Yui's absorption as Yui was to be killed by Seele and she have instructions on what to do afther she was gone. She might even have given the instruction to make Rei. It might be mixing sources manga and anime but anime Fuyutsuki indeed calls Rei "the product of his despair" manga fuyutsuki says he deeply regretted agreeing to do Yui's wishes afther she died as it caused a lot of harm to many people. He might or might not have been aware that the person he was talking to was not Yui but Rei as he tells "Yui" if she had already found Yui-kun
